hero.subTagline: A focused 3–4 month engagement to close the competitive gap, optimize high-intent treatment pages, and turn organic traffic into consultation bookings.

about.description: Below the Board is a full-service digital marketing agency built for brands that need results, not excuses. We specialize in SEO, Meta Ads, Email Marketing, and WooCommerce development — with a track record of driving measurable growth for competitive and restricted-niche brands across Canada and the United States.

overview.headline: The Opportunity
overview.subheadline: Dr. Katie Beleznay already has strong authority, brand recognition, and credibility in the Vancouver market. The opportunity is to better translate that authority into stronger organic visibility, better treatment-page performance, and more consultation inquiries. Based on our review, there is a clear opportunity to refresh the site's SEO foundation, improve how key treatment pages compete in search, and close the gap between Dr. Katie's site and other high-performing cosmetic dermatology competitors in Vancouver.
objectives: Improve visibility for high-intent treatment searches in Vancouver
Strengthen the website's ability to generate consultations
Identify where competitors are currently winning and close those gaps
Improve the quality and structure of key service pages
Ensure lead capture and inquiry flow are functioning properly

strategy.title: Competitive Gap Analysis
strategy.description: Review Dr. Katie's site against Dr. Shannon Humphrey and other top Vancouver competitors to identify gaps in treatment-page structure, content depth, local targeting, and conversion positioning.

strategy.title: High-Intent SEO Optimization
strategy.description: Refresh and optimize the treatment pages most likely to drive qualified inquiries, with emphasis on local commercial intent and search visibility.

strategy.title: Conversion & Lead Path Improvement
strategy.description: Ensure the site is positioned to turn improved traffic into consultation requests by reviewing forms, inquiry flow, and page-level conversion elements.

keywordAreas.intro: The initial keyword focus will center on high-intent treatment searches with strong local commercial intent in the Vancouver market.

months.title: Month 1 — Audit, Benchmarking & Strategic Foundation
deliverables: Competitor gap analysis (Dr. Shannon Humphrey + top Vancouver competitors)
Technical, structural, and on-page SEO audit

months.title: Month 2 — Core Page Optimization
deliverables: Title tag and meta description rewrites
Homepage / services page SEO recommendations if needed

months.title: Month 3 — Content Support & Topic Reinforcement
deliverables: FAQ expansion and long-tail keyword support
Refinement based on early performance data

successMetrics: Ranking movement for target keywords (Botox Vancouver, Fillers Vancouver, etc.)
Improved visibility for key treatment pages in Google Search Console
Growth in organic traffic to optimized pages
Stronger lead capture reliability across all forms

tiers.label: Recommended Package

items.description: Full 3–4 month engagement: audit, optimization, content support, and monthly reporting

tiers.note: Recommended term: 3–4 months. This budget range provides enough runway to perform meaningful competitive analysis, optimize the most commercially important pages, strengthen site structure, and measure whether the work is generating the right early signals.

investment.roiContext: This engagement is designed to be practical, measurable, and aligned with the $2,500–$3,000/month budget and 3–4 month timeline you outlined. SEO is a longer-term play — the goal in this sprint is to lay the right foundation, optimize the pages most likely to drive consultation bookings, and generate clear early signals of momentum before deciding on next steps.
investment.exitClause: No long-term lock-in. We recommend a 3–4 month term to allow enough time to see meaningful results, but we're happy to discuss a month-to-month arrangement after the initial sprint.

caseStudies.description: $630,574 in revenue generated in 7 months vs. $58,306 the prior year. 538+ keywords ranked. Built from near-zero organic presence to market dominance in a competitive restricted niche.
Scaled from $1,699/mo to $23,479/mo in 7 months. 7.57x ROAS on best-performing campaign. Achieved in a restricted niche where most agencies won't run ads.
5.52x average ROAS across 7 campaigns. Grew email revenue from $0 to $45K/month. Full-funnel approach combining paid social with lifecycle email marketing.

nextSteps.closing: We're ready to get started. The next step is a short onboarding call to align on priorities, confirm access to the website and Google Search Console, and kick off the Month 1 audit. The sooner we start, the sooner we can close the gap on Dr. Shannon Humphrey and get Dr. Katie's treatment pages ranking where they should be.
